somali.inverts_input_built_from_1_pmos_1_nmos: Wuxuu rogaa gelinta. Waxaa laga dhisay 1 PMOS + 1 NMOS (CMOS inverter).
somali.output_high_only_when_both_inputs_are_: Wax-soo-saarku waa sare kaliya marka labada gelin ay sare yihiin. NAND + NOT (6 transistor).
somali.output_high_when_any_input_is_high_nor: Wax-soo-saarku waa sare marka gelin kasta oo sare tahay. NOR + NOT (6 transistor).
somali.universal_gate_2_series_nmos_2_paralle: Albaab caalami ah! 2 NMOS isku xiga + 2 PMOS isbarbar. Macquul oo dhan wuxuu ka yimid NAND.
somali.universal_gate_2_parallel_nmos_2_serie: Albaab caalami ah! 2 NMOS isbarbar + 2 PMOS isku xiga.
somali.output_high_when_inputs_differ_key_for: Wax-soo-saarku waa sare marka gelinta ay kala duwan yihiin. Muhiim u ah wadareyaasha. Wuxuu isticmaalaa ~8 transistor.
somali.output_high_when_inputs_match_used_in_: Wax-soo-saarku waa sare marka gelinta ay is-waafaqaan. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa isbarbardhigayaasha.
somali.build_a_circuit_from_components_add_pa: Ka dhis wareeg qaybaha. Ku dar qaybo, ka dibna jilaa!
somali.click_components_above_to_add_them: Guji qaybaha kore si aad ugu darto
somali.a_silicon_ingot_is_pulled_from_molten_: Qori silikoon ah ayaa laga soo jiidaa silikoon dhalaalay iyada oo la adeegsanayo habka Czochralski ~1414 °C.
somali.the_ingot_is_sliced_into_thin_wafers_7: Qoriga waxaa loo gooyaa wafero khafiif ah (~775 μm dhumucdiisu) miinshaarrada silig dheeman.
somali.a_thin_layer_of_sio_is_grown_on_the_wa: Lakab khafiif ah oo SiO₂ ah ayaa lagu koriyaa dusha sare ee wafer ~1000 °C foorno oksijiin ah.
somali.uv_light_transfers_circuit_patterns_fr: Iftiinka UV wuxuu u wareejiyaa qaababka wareegga maaska una gudbiyaa wafarrada fotoresist lagu daboolay.
somali.unwanted_material_is_removed_by_chemic: Walxaha aan la rabin waxaa lagu saaraa xardhid kiimiko (qoyan) ama plasma (qalalan).
somali.dopant_atoms_are_shot_into_the_silicon: Atamka dopant-ka waxaa lagu tuuraa silikoon-ka tamar sare si loo beddelo sifooyinkiisa korontada.
somali.metal_and_insulator_layers_are_deposit: Lakabyada birta iyo insulator-ka waxaa lagu dhigaa farsamooyinka CVD, PVD ama ALD.
somali.metal_interconnects_are_patterned_and_: Isku-xirka birta waa la qaabeeyaa oo si siman loo dhalaaliyaa. Lakabyo badan ayaa dhisa silbaha wareegga.
somali.moore_s_law_graph_showing_transistor_c: Garaafka Sharciga Moore oo muujinaya tirada transistor-ka 1965 ilaa 2030
somali.6_transistors_per_bit_2_cross_coupled_: 6 transistor bit kasta: 2 inverter isku-xiran + 2 transistor gelitaan. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa cache-ka CPU.
somali.1_transistor_1_capacitor_per_bit_must_: 1 transistor + 1 kabaasitar bit kasta. Waa in la cusboonaysiiyaa ~64 ms kasta. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa xusuusta guud (moduulada RAM).
somali.floating_gate_transistor_traps_charge_: Transistor-ka albaabka sabaynaya wuxuu qabtaa cadeeynta. NOR: gelitaan aan kala sarreyn, waxaa loo isticmaalaa firmware/BIOS.
somali.series_connected_floating_gates_sequen: Albaabbada sabaynaya oo isku xiga. Gelitaan taxane ah laakiin aad u cufan. SSD, USB drive, kaararka SD.
somali.ferroelectric_capacitor_stores_charge_: Kabaasitarka ferroelectric wuxuu kaydiyaa cadeeynta polarization hadhay. Aan lumin + qorid degdeg ah. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa kaararka caqli, baabuurta.
somali.voltage_amplifier_high_input_impedance: Weyneeyaha korontada. Impedance gelitaan sare (∞ ku fiican). Faaiido = -gₘRₓ. Wuxuu rogaa calaamadda. Weyneeyaha MOSFET ee ugu caansan.
somali.voltage_buffer_gain_1_no_inversion_low: Buffer korontada. Faaiido ≈ 1 (rogid maleh). Impedance wax-soo-saar hooseeya → wanaagsan wadista culeyska. Sidoo kale waxaa loo yaqaan raacaha isha.
somali.current_buffer_low_input_impedance_non: Buffer korontada. Impedance gelitaan hooseeya. Aan rogayn. Bandwidth ballaaran → wanaagsan codsiyada RF.
somali.bjt_voltage_amplifier_gain_g_r_inverts: Weyneeyaha korontada BJT. Faaiido = -gₘRᶜ. Wuxuu rogaa calaamadda. Faaiido ka sarreysa MOSFET laakiin impedance gelitaan hooseeya.
somali.amplifies_difference_of_two_inputs_rej: Wuxuu weyneeyaa farqiga labada gelin. Wuxuu diidaa buuqa common-mode. Aasaaska op-amp. CMRR sida caadiga ah >60dB.
somali.band_gaps_between_0_5_and_3_5_ev_are_s: Farqiga band-ka inta u dhexeeya 0.5 iyo 3.5 eV waa semiconductor.
somali.extra_electrons_n_for_negative_charge_: Elektaroon dheeraad ah = N qaadeyaasha cadeeynta Taban.
somali.think_of_it_as_multiplication_1_1_1_ev: U fikir sida isku dhufasho: 1×1=1, wax kastoo kale=0.
somali.carriers_recombine_at_the_junction_lea: Qaadeyaasha ayaa mar kale isku dara isku-xirka iyaga oo ka tagaya ioono go'an.
somali.positive_gate_attracts_electrons_to_fo: Albaabka togan wuxuu soo jiidaa elektaroono si uu u sameeyo kanaal.
somali.more_thermal_energy_more_electron_hole: Tamar kulayl badan = lammaane elektaroon-god badan.
somali.nand_can_implement_not_and_or_everythi: NAND wuxuu fulin karaa NOT, AND, OR — wax walba!
somali.pmos_nmos_work_as_a_complementary_pair: PMOS + NMOS waxay u shaqeeyaan lammaane dhammaystiran.
somali.speed_mobility_gaas_8500_vs_si_1400_cm: Xawaare ∝ dhaqdhaqaaq. GaAs: 8500 vs Si: 1400 cm²/Vs.
somali.zener_diodes_are_designed_to_conduct_i: Diyoodyada Zener waxaa loo naqshadeeyay in ay gudbiyaan si gadaal ah!
somali.the_o_in_mos_stands_for_oxide_insulato: "O" ee MOS waxay u taagan tahay Oksaydh (insulator).
somali.boron_has_3_valence_electrons_1_fewer_: Boron wuxuu leeyahay 3 elektaroon valence (1 ka yar Si).
somali.carbon_forms_very_strong_bonds: Kaarboon wuxuu sameeyaa xirmooyin aad u xoog badan.
somali.in_cmos_one_transistor_is_always_off_b: CMOS gudaheeda, hal transistor ayaa had iyo jeer damman, kuna xannibaya korontada.
somali.n_1_for_ideal_junction_n_2_for_recombi: n=1 isku-xirka fiican, n=2 isku-darka mar kale ee gobolka yaraynta.
somali.e_3_4_ev_allows_higher_voltage_operati: Eₗ = 3.4 eV wuxuu ogolaadaa hawlgal koronto sare.
somali.sum_a_xor_b_carry_a_and_b: Wadar = A XOR B, Qaad = A AND B.
somali.higher_v_ce_widens_the_depletion_regio: V_CE sare wuxuu ballaadhiyaa gobolka yaraynta base-ka.
somali.e_1_l_smaller_box_higher_energy_steps: E ∝ 1/L² — sanduuq yar = tallaabooyin tamar weyn.
somali.telecom_lasers_use_ingaasp_quantum_wel: Laasarrada isgaarsiinta waxay isticmaalaan ceelasha kwaantam InGaAsP si ay u xakameeyaan dhererka mowjadda si sax ah.
somali.dram_stores_bits_as_charge_on_a_tiny_c: DRAM wuxuu kaydiyaa bits sida cadeeyn kabaasitar yar — way daadataa!
somali.the_floating_gate_is_electrically_isol: Albaabka sabaynaya waxaa korontada lagu go'doomiyay lakabyo oksaydh.
somali.l1_cache_needs_the_fastest_possible_ac: Cache L1 wuxuu u baahan yahay waqtiga gelitaan ugu dhaqso badan.
somali.it_s_a_buffer_unity_gain_impedance_tra: Waa buffer: faaiido midaysan, beddelka impedance.
somali.higher_gain_lower_bandwidth_a_bw_gbw_c: Faaiido sare = bandwidth hooseeya. Aᵥ × BW = GBW = joogto.
somali.a_swarm_of_logic_bugs_what_gate_output: Rar cayayaan macquul ah! Albaabkee ayaa soo saara 1 marka A=0?
somali.a_voltage_spike_is_overloading_which_d: Kor u kac koronto ayaa culays badan saaraya! Qalabkee ayaa xakameeya korontada?
somali.temperature_rising_in_a_semiconductor_: Heerkulku wuu kordhayaa! Semiconductor gudaheeda, maxay kororka heerkulka ku sameeyaan gudbinta?
somali.an_enemy_flipped_all_bits_which_gate_c: Cadow ayaa rogay bits-ka oo dhan! Albaabkee ayaa rogi kara calaamad kasta?
somali.carriers_are_leaking_what_narrows_the_: Qaadeyaasha ayaa daadanaya! Maxaa cidhiidhi ka dhiga gobolka yaraynta?
somali.electrostatic_discharge_what_protects_: Sii-deynta korontada taagan! Maxaa ka ilaaliya IC-yada ESD?
somali.clock_is_unstable_cmos_power_dissipati: Saacadu ma xasilloona! Kala-daadinta tamarta CMOS waxay u dhiganta:
somali.direct_short_what_is_the_threshold_vol: Gaaban toos ah! Waa maxay korontada xadka Si-MOSFET caadiga ah?
somali.electrons_are_tunneling_through_the_ox: Elektaroono ayaa dhex marayaa oksaydhka! Ceel kwaantam ah, ceel cidhiidhi ah =
somali.memory_bits_are_flipping_which_memory_: Bits-ka xusuusta ayaa rogaya! Noocee xusuus ah ayaa u baahan cusboonaysiin?
somali.signal_to_noise_ratio_dropping_what_do: Saamiga calaamadda-buuqa ayaa hoos u dhacaya! Maxaa weyneeyaha kala duwan diidaa?
somali.final_boss_what_limits_transistor_scal: Madaxa ugu dambeeya! Maxaa xaddida cabbirka transistor-ka ka hooseeya ~1 nm oksaydh albaab?
somali.protect_your_chip_from_waves_of_hardwa: Ka ilaali chip-kaaga hirarka cadaawayaasha qalabka! Isticmaal aqoonta semiconductor si aad uga celiso.
somali.doping_silicon_with_phosphorus_n_type_: Daajinta silikoon-ka fosforas (nooca-n) ama boron (nooca-p) waa aasaaska chip kasta oo abid la sameeyay. Isku-xirka PN waa unugga dhisidda ee diyood kasta + LED + unug qorraxeed + transistor.
somali.bias_a_transistor_calculate_band_gap_e: Eexee transistor, xisaabi tamarta farqiga band-ka, saadaali koronto iyo koronto. Dhibaatooyinka AP Physics 2 + hordhaca EE oo leh jawaab-celin tallaabo-tallaabo.
somali.time_pressure_rounds_build_a_circuit_f: Wareegyada cadaadis waqti: dhis wareeg ka dhaqso badan saacadda. Wuxuu tijaabiyaa in aqoonta semiconductor ay tahay mid toos ah, ma aha kaliya la aqoonsaday.
somali.bardeen_brattain_shockley_invented_the: Bardeen + Brattain + Shockley waxay soo saareen transistor Bell Labs (1947); Nobel 1956. Sharciga Moore: tirada transistor-ka waxay laba-labaysaa ~2 sano kasta; wuxuu socday 50+ sano ka hor inta uusan yaraan.
somali.minimal_dopant_pure_semiconductor_high: Dopant yar. Semiconductor saafi ah — iska-caabin sare.
somali.some_carriers_introduced_typical_extri: Qaar ka mid ah qaadeyaasha ayaa la soo bandhigay. Nidaam dibadeed caadi ah.
somali.strong_conductivity_used_in_transistor: Gudbin xoog leh, waxaa loo isticmaalaa transistor.
somali.approaching_metallic_behavior_used_for: Ku soo dhawaanaya dabeecad bir. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa xiriirinta.
somali.adjust_dopant_concentration_temperatur: Hagaaji cufnaanta dopant, heerkulka, walxaha. Nidaam kala-sooc 4-band ah. Dhibco maleh, daahfurid maleh.
somali.hypothesis_how_does_temperature_affect: Mala-awaal: Sidee heerkulku u saameeyaa cufnaanta qaadeyaasha?
somali.compare_si_and_gaas_at_same_concentrat: Isbarbardhig Si iyo GaAs cufnaan isku mid ah. Maxay u kala duwan yihiin?
somali.find_two_settings_producing_same_regim: Hel laba dejin oo soo saara nidaam isku mid ah.
somali.explain_how_concentration_temperature_: Sharax sida cufnaanta, heerkulka, iyo walxaha ay wada go'aamiyaan nidaamka.
somali.design_note_discrete_4_state_marker_no: Qoraal naqshad: calaamad 4-xaalad kala-sooc ah; dhibco cufnaanta qaadeyaasha maleh; daahfurid maleh — naqshad ahaan.
somali.loading_semiconductor_lab: Waxaa la soo raraya Shaybaarka Semiconductor…

lingala.inverts_input_built_from_1_pmos_1_nmos: Ebongolaka input. Etongami na PMOS 1 + NMOS 1 (CMOS inverter).
lingala.output_high_only_when_both_inputs_are_: Output ezali likolo kaka soki input mibale ezali likolo. NAND + NOT (transistor 6).
lingala.output_high_when_any_input_is_high_nor: Output ezali likolo soki input nyonso ezali likolo. NOR + NOT (transistor 6).
lingala.universal_gate_2_series_nmos_2_paralle: Porte ya molɔ́ngɔ́ mobimba! NMOS 2 na molɔngɔ + PMOS 2 parallèle. Lojiki nyonso ewuti na NAND.
lingala.universal_gate_2_parallel_nmos_2_serie: Porte ya molɔ́ngɔ́ mobimba! NMOS 2 parallèle + PMOS 2 na molɔngɔ.
lingala.output_high_when_inputs_differ_key_for: Output ezali likolo soki bainput ekeseni. Ya ntina mpo na basangisi. Esalelaka ~8 transistor.
lingala.output_high_when_inputs_match_used_in_: Output ezali likolo soki bainput ekokani. Esalelaka na bakomparateur.
lingala.data_table_a_b_q: Tablo ya ba-données: A, B, Q
lingala.build_a_circuit_from_components_add_pa: Tonga sarkite na biteni. Bakisa biteni, na sima simuler!
lingala.click_components_above_to_add_them: Fina biteni na likolo mpo na kobakisa yango
lingala.a_silicon_ingot_is_pulled_from_molten_: Libaya ya silikɔ ebendami na silikɔ oyo enyangwisami na nzela ya Czochralski na ~1414 °C.
lingala.the_ingot_is_sliced_into_thin_wafers_7: Libaya ekatami na ba-wafer ya moke (~775 μm mokuse) na basiyo ya nsinga ya diama.
lingala.a_thin_layer_of_sio_is_grown_on_the_wa: Etanda moke ya SiO₂ ekolisami na etando ya wafer na ~1000 °C na fulu ya oksijɛni.
lingala.uv_light_transfers_circuit_patterns_fr: Pole ya UV ememaka ba-modèles ya sarkite longwa na maske ekei na ba-wafer oyo bapakoli fotoresist.
lingala.unwanted_material_is_removed_by_chemic: Biloko oyo balingi te elongolamaka na kokata ya chimie (mai) to plasma (kokauka).
lingala.dopant_atoms_are_shot_into_the_silicon: Ba-atome ya dopant ebwakami na silikɔ na énergie makasi mpo na kobongola bizaleli na yango ya kura.
lingala.metal_and_insulator_layers_are_deposit: Ba-couches ya bibende mpe insulator etiami na ba-techniques CVD, PVD to ALD.
lingala.metal_interconnects_are_patterned_and_: Ba-interconnexions ya bibende esalemi na modèle mpe epakolami mbala moko. Ba-couches ebele etongaka basinga ya sarkite.
lingala.moore_s_law_graph_showing_transistor_c: Grafike ya Mobeko ya Moore emonisi motango ya transistor longwa 1965 tii 2030
lingala.6_transistors_per_bit_2_cross_coupled_: Transistor 6 na bit moko: inverter 2 esangani + transistor 2 ya kokota. Esalelaka na cache ya CPU.
lingala.1_transistor_1_capacitor_per_bit_must_: Transistor 1 + kapasitɛ 1 na bit moko. Esengeli ko-rafrechir mbala nyonso ~64 ms. Esalelaka na mémoire ya likolo (ba-modules RAM).
lingala.floating_gate_transistor_traps_charge_: Transistor ya porte oyo ezali kobeba ekangaka charge. NOR: kokota na ndenge nyonso, esalelaka na firmware/BIOS.
lingala.series_connected_floating_gates_sequen: Baporte oyo ezali kobeba esangani na molɔngɔ. Kokota na molɔngɔ kasi ya makasi mingi. SSD, ba-drive USB, ba-carte SD.
lingala.ferroelectric_capacitor_stores_charge_: Kapasitɛ ferroelectric ebombaka charge na polarisation oyo etikali. Ezali kolimwa te + kokoma noki. Esalelaka na ba-carte ya mayele, mituka.
lingala.voltage_amplifier_high_input_impedance: Ematiseli ya tension. Impédance ya input likolo (∞ mpo na malamu). Litomba = -gₘRₓ. Ebongolaka signal. Ematiseli MOSFET ya kolekana.
lingala.voltage_buffer_gain_1_no_inversion_low: Buffer ya tension. Litomba ≈ 1 (bobongoli te). Impédance ya output moke → malamu mpo na kotambwisa mikumba. Babengaka pe molandi liziba.
lingala.current_buffer_low_input_impedance_non: Buffer ya courant. Impédance ya input moke. Ebongolaka te. Bandwidth ya monene → malamu mpo na ba-application RF.
lingala.bjt_voltage_amplifier_gain_g_r_inverts: Ematiseli ya tension BJT. Litomba = -gₘRᶜ. Ebongolaka signal. Litomba ya likolo koleka MOSFET kasi impédance ya input moke.
lingala.amplifies_difference_of_two_inputs_rej: Ematisaka bokeseni ya ba-input mibale. Eboyaka makelele ya common-mode. Miboko ya ba-op-amp. CMRR mbala mingi >60dB.
lingala.band_gaps_between_0_5_and_3_5_ev_are_s: Ba-lidusu ya band kati ya 0.5 mpe 3.5 eV ezali ba-semiconductor.
lingala.extra_electrons_n_for_negative_charge_: Ba-électron ya kobakisa = N mpo na bamemi ya charge Négative.
lingala.think_of_it_as_multiplication_1_1_1_ev: Kanisa yango lokola bopusi: 1×1=1, mosusu nyonso=0.
lingala.carriers_recombine_at_the_junction_lea: Bamemi esanganaka lisusu na bosangani mpe etikaka ba-ion oyo etikali.
lingala.positive_gate_attracts_electrons_to_fo: Porte ya positif ebendaka ba-électron mpo na kosala canal.
lingala.forward_pushing_carriers_toward_the_ju: Liboso = kotindika bamemi EPAI ya bosangani.
lingala.more_thermal_energy_more_electron_hole: Énergie ya molunge ebele = ba-paire électron-libulu ebele.
lingala.nand_can_implement_not_and_or_everythi: NAND ekoki kosala NOT, AND, OR — nyonso!
lingala.pmos_nmos_work_as_a_complementary_pair: PMOS + NMOS esalaka lokola bakambi mibale bakokisi.
lingala.speed_mobility_gaas_8500_vs_si_1400_cm: Mbangu ∝ mobembo. GaAs: 8500 vs Si: 1400 cm²/Vs.
lingala.zener_diodes_are_designed_to_conduct_i: Ba-diode Zener esalema mpo na kotambwisa na nsima!
lingala.boron_has_3_valence_electrons_1_fewer_: Bɔrɔ ezali na ba-électron valence 3 (1 moke koleka Si).
lingala.v_kt_q_ln_n_n_n_for_typical_doping_lev: Vₑᵢ = (kT/q)ln(NₐNₓ/nᵢ²) mpo na ba-niveau ya kotia biloko ya momesano.
lingala.carbon_forms_very_strong_bonds: Karbone esalaka ba-liaison ya makasi mingi.
lingala.in_cmos_one_transistor_is_always_off_b: Na CMOS, transistor moko ezali ntango nyonso ekufi, ekangaka courant.
lingala.n_1_for_ideal_junction_n_2_for_recombi: n=1 mpo na bosangani ya malamu, n=2 mpo na bosangani lisusu na etuka ya bokiti.
lingala.e_3_4_ev_allows_higher_voltage_operati: Eₗ = 3.4 eV epesaka nzela ya mosala na tension ya likolo.
lingala.sum_a_xor_b_carry_a_and_b: Motango = A XOR B, Komema = A AND B.
lingala.higher_v_ce_widens_the_depletion_regio: V_CE ya likolo efungolaka etuka ya bokiti na kati ya base.
lingala.e_1_l_smaller_box_higher_energy_steps: E ∝ 1/L² — sanduku ya moke = ba-degré ya énergie ya minene.
lingala.telecom_lasers_use_ingaasp_quantum_wel: Ba-laser ya télécom esalelaka mabulu ya kwantɛ InGaAsP mpo na kokamba bolai ya mbonge malamu.
lingala.6t_sram_2_cross_coupled_inverters_4t_2: SRAM 6T: inverter 2 esangani (4T) + transistor 2 ya kokota.
lingala.dram_stores_bits_as_charge_on_a_tiny_c: DRAM ebombaka bits lokola charge na kapasitɛ ya moke — ekita!
lingala.the_floating_gate_is_electrically_isol: Porte oyo ezali kobeba ekabolami na kura na ba-couches ya oksidɛ.
lingala.l1_cache_needs_the_fastest_possible_ac: Cache L1 esengeli na ntango ya kokota ya mbangu koleka.
lingala.it_s_a_buffer_unity_gain_impedance_tra: Ezali buffer: litomba moko, bobongoli ya impédance.
lingala.higher_gain_lower_bandwidth_a_bw_gbw_c: Litomba ya likolo = bandwidth ya moke. Aᵥ × BW = GBW = constante.
lingala.a_swarm_of_logic_bugs_what_gate_output: Ebele ya ba-bug ya lojiki! Porte nini ebimisaka 1 tango A=0?
lingala.a_voltage_spike_is_overloading_which_d: Komata ya tension ezali kotia mokumba mingi! Esaleli nini ekambaka tension?
lingala.temperature_rising_in_a_semiconductor_: Molunge ezali komata! Na semiconductor, komata ya molunge esalaka nini na conductivité?
lingala.an_enemy_flipped_all_bits_which_gate_c: Monguna abongoli bits nyonso! Porte nini ekoki kobongola signal nyonso?
lingala.carriers_are_leaking_what_narrows_the_: Bamemi ezali kokita! Nini ekitisaka etuka ya bokiti?
lingala.electrostatic_discharge_what_protects_: Kobima ya kura ya électrostatique! Nini ebatelaka ba-IC na ESD?
lingala.clock_is_unstable_cmos_power_dissipati: Saa ezali stable te! Kobima ya nguya ya CMOS ezali proportionnel na:
lingala.direct_short_what_is_the_threshold_vol: Court ya mbala moko! Tension ya seuil ya Si-MOSFET ya momesano ezali nini?
lingala.electrons_are_tunneling_through_the_ox: Ba-électron ezali koleka na kati ya oksidɛ! Na libulu ya kwantɛ, libulu ya moke koleka =
lingala.memory_bits_are_flipping_which_memory_: Bits ya mémoire ezali kobongwana! Lolenge nini ya mémoire esengeli na rafrechir?
lingala.signal_to_noise_ratio_dropping_what_do: Ratio ya signal na makelele ezali kokita! Ematiseli ya différentiel eboyaka nini?
lingala.final_boss_what_limits_transistor_scal: Mokonzi ya nsuka! Nini ekangaka bokitisi ya transistor na se ya oksidɛ ya porte ya ~1 nm?
lingala.protect_your_chip_from_waves_of_hardwa: Batela chip na yo na bambonge ya banguna ya matériel! Salela boyebi ya semiconductor mpo na kozongisa.
lingala.doping_silicon_with_phosphorus_n_type_: Kotia silikɔ fosfɔrɛ (lolenge-n) to bɔrɔ (lolenge-p) ezali miboko ya chip nyonso oyo esalema. Bosangani PN ezali eloko ya kotonga ya diode nyonso + LED + selile ya moi + transistor.
lingala.bias_a_transistor_calculate_band_gap_e: Tia bias na transistor, tanga énergie ya lidusu ya band, sakola courant na tension. Mikakatano ya AP Physics 2 + ebandeli ya EE na retour ya litambe na litambe.
lingala.battle_head_to_head_circuit_duels: Etumba — bitumba ya sarkite elongi na elongi
lingala.time_pressure_rounds_build_a_circuit_f: Ba-tour ya botindiki ya ntango: tonga sarkite mbangu koleka minuterie. Emekaka soki bokanisi ya semiconductor ezali ya automatique, ezali kaka koyeba te.
lingala.bardeen_brattain_shockley_invented_the: Bardeen + Brattain + Shockley basalaki transistor na Bell Labs (1947); Nobel 1956. Mobeko ya Moore: motango ya transistor ekómaka mbala mibale ~mibu 2 nyonso; ezalaki mibu 50+ liboso ya kokita.
lingala.minimal_dopant_pure_semiconductor_high: Dopant moke. Semiconductor peto — résistivité ya likolo.
lingala.some_carriers_introduced_typical_extri: Bamemi mosusu bakotisami. Régime extrinsic ya momesano.
lingala.approaching_metallic_behavior_used_for: Kopusana na ezaleli ya ebende. Esalelaka mpo na ba-contact.
lingala.adjust_dopant_concentration_temperatur: Bongisa concentration ya dopant, molunge, biloko. Régime ya band 4 ekabwani. Nota te, kolakisa te.
lingala.hypothesis_how_does_temperature_affect: Likanisi: Ndenge nini molunge esimbaka concentration ya bamemi?
lingala.compare_si_and_gaas_at_same_concentrat: Kokanisa Si na GaAs na concentration moko. Mpo na nini ekeseni?
lingala.find_two_settings_producing_same_regim: Luka ba-réglage mibale oyo esalaka régime moko.
lingala.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Nasosoli — limbola na maloba na yo
lingala.explain_how_concentration_temperature_: Limbola ndenge concentration, molunge, mpe biloko esalaka esika moko régime.
lingala.design_note_discrete_4_state_marker_no: Nota ya design: elembo ya bikelakela 4 ekabwani; nota ya densité ya bamemi te; kolakisa te — na design.
